1. https://www.coindesk.com/api/ - CoinDesk's API for Bitcoin Price Index (BPI) data
2. https://api.coindesk.com/v1/bpi/currentprice.json - CoinDesk's free Bitcoin price API endpoint (JSON format)
3. https://api.coindesk.com/v1/bpi/historicalclose.json - CoinDesk's historical Bitcoin price data API endpoint (JSON format)
